title: From Citation Selection to Citation Absorption: A Measurement Framework for Generative Engine Optimization Across AI Search Platforms
code_or_dataset_url: public geo-citation-lab dataset claimed in paper
geo_relevance: Directly upgrades GEO measurement from citation count to citation influence and absorption
reason: Separates citation selection from citation absorption, which is highly aligned with trustworthy GEO and attribution fidelity evaluation.
notes: Track as O3_citation_attribution; verify dataset landing page before adding benchmark table as public asset.

title: Generative Engine Optimization: A VLM and Agent Framework for Pinterest Acquisition Growth
geo_relevance: Production scale visual GEO with VLM search-intent prediction, trend-mining agents, collection pages, multimodal embeddings and authority-aware interlinking
reason: Important production evidence that GEO is moving into multimodal, visual, platform-scale acquisition systems.
notes: Treat traffic/MAU claims as industrial self-report unless independently reproduced.

title: How Generative AI Disrupts Search: An Empirical Study of Google Search, Gemini, and AI Overviews
code_or_dataset_url: public 11500 query benchmark claimed in paper
geo_relevance: Shows generative search source selection differs sharply from traditional Google ranking and affects GEO effectiveness
reason: Useful for understanding Google Search, AI Overview and Gemini source overlap, AIO activation, crawler blocking effects, and query edit robustness.
notes: Add to papers.csv and benchmark table after dataset URL is verified.

title: Answer Bubbles: Information Exposure in AI-Mediated Search
geo_relevance: Studies source diversity, language shifts and source-summary fidelity across vanilla GPT, Search GPT, Google AI Overviews and Google Search
reason: Important for source-selection bias and citation-fidelity framing in GEO.

title: The Impact of AI Search on the Online Content Ecosystem: Evidence from Google and Reddit
geo_relevance: Recent causal evidence on how AI Overviews and AI Mode change Reddit engagement and content incentives
reason: Important ecosystem-impact evidence for why GEO must model exposure, engagement, traffic and platform UI separately.

title: Impact of AI Search Summaries on Website Traffic: Evidence from Google AI Overviews and Wikipedia
geo_relevance: Causal evidence that AI Overview exposure can reduce informational publisher traffic
reason: Important for GEO value modeling because visibility and citation do not necessarily translate into traffic.

title: Measuring Google AI Overviews: Activation, Source Quality, Claim Fidelity, and Publisher Impact
geo_relevance: Large-scale longitudinal AIO measurement of activation, source quality, unsupported claims and publisher advertising impact
reason: Strong complement to GEO citation-fidelity and source-quality evaluation.

title: The Rise of AI Search: Implications for Information Markets and Human Judgement at Scale
geo_relevance: Global-scale AI search exposure study across countries and topics
reason: Useful for framing GEO as a global information-market phenomenon and not only a content rewriting task.
